title: NaturalGrowth
description: NaturalGrowth causes dropped plants to plant themselves on the ground instead of despawning.
body:
NaturalGrowth causes dropped plants to plant themselves on the ground instead of despawning.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/YooLo_BGxIg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


this plugin works with all saplings including large trees, flowers, crops, fungi and mushrooms



if you have any questions, suggestions, requests, comments or just want to hang out join my discord: https://discord.gg/czh2zTQ
